notes.f1: Recovered — William Hubert Ferber linked as a couple to his wife Emma (Becker), recorded in the tree under her married name 'Emma Ferber', b. March 1871 Ohio (finding says Emma Becker, 25 Mar 1870 Cincinnati — month matches, year off by one). Spouse identity recovered.
notes.f2: Recovered exactly (and better) — the couple relationship carries Marriage 10 September 1890, Hamilton County, Ohio, matching the expected 1890 / Hamilton County answer with a full date. Proof tier proved, independent corroboration -> proof_quality 3.
